title: Retell Create LLM Response
description: JSON Schema for the response returned by the Retell Create Retell LLM (POST /create-retell-llm) and Get Retell LLM (GET /get-retell-llm/:llm_id) endpoints.

llm_id.description: Unique identifier for the LLM configuration. Format: llm_XXXXX.

model.description: The LLM model used for generating responses.

general_prompt.description: The system-level prompt defining the agent's persona, instructions, and behavior.

general_tools.description: Tools available across all conversation states.

description.description: Description of when and how the tool should be used.

number.description: Phone number for transfer_call tool type.

url.description: Webhook URL for custom tool type.

speak_during_execution.description: Whether the agent speaks while the tool executes.

speak_after_execution.description: Whether the agent speaks after the tool returns.

execution_message_description.description: Description of what to say while the tool executes.

parameters.description: JSON Schema for the tool's input parameters (custom tool type only).

cal_api_key.description: Cal.com API key (check_availability_cal and book_appointment_cal types).

event_type_id.description: Cal.com event type ID (check_availability_cal and book_appointment_cal types).

state_prompt.description: Instructions for the agent when in this state.

parameters.description: Optional parameters to extract during transition.

tools.description: Tools available only in this state (same schema as general_tools items).

starting_state.description: Name of the initial state. Must match a state name in the states array.

begin_message.description: The first message the agent speaks when the call starts. Null means the agent waits for the caller.

inbound_dynamic_variables_webhook_url.description: URL called on inbound calls to fetch dynamic variables.

tool_call_strict_mode.description: Whether the LLM strictly follows tool schemas.

last_modification_timestamp.description: Unix timestamp of the last modification.
